The '''Sabaoth starfighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]]'s [[Sabaoth Squadron/Legends|Sabaoth Squadron]] during the years leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They carried a total of four [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] and were [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by one individual. Sabaoth starfighters saw extensive action during the [[Occupation of Karthakk]].

==Characteristics==
The Sabaoth starfighter comprised two down and forward-sloping wings attached to a small cockpit. The design was based on that of an attacking bird of prey. The fighter's two twin [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]] were located on each wingtip, and on either side of the cockpits bottom, offering a wide fire arc.<ref name="SW:JS" />

Sabaoth starfighters carried one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and had a capacity for 50 kg of cargo and consumables for one week.<ref name="TCWCG" />

They were weakly-[[Deflector shield/Legends|shielded]] and designed to attack in numbers similar to [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] meaning that once the shields were down, one hit would destroy the whole starfighter. Sabaoth fighters were carried aboard [[Sabaoth destroyer]]s, and often flew into battle alongside heavy [[Sabaoth Defender]] fighters.<ref name="SW:JS" />

==History==
[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] made a pact with [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Cavik Toth]], whereby Toth's starfighters were used to bolster [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] defenses.<ref name="SW:JS" />

[[Nym/Legends|Nym's]] pirate forces ran [[Occupation of Karthakk|afoul]] of these deadly starfighters during their battles with Captain Toth's [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] on [[Nod Kartha]] and over the [[Karthakk system's sun|Karthakk]] system prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] and her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Siri Tachi/Legends|Siri Tachi]], also engaged these nimble fighters over [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] as they prevented Toth's [[Trihexalon|hex-equipped]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] from attacking the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]].<ref name="SW:JS" />

==Behind the scenes==
A Sabaoth fighter was originally supposed to appear in [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars|''The Clone Wars'']] episode [[Dooku Captured]], but was cut early in production.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' {{1st}}
